S.FORM: Philippe of Belgium I 1960 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Philippe of Belgium, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Belguim anini i ci Philippe of Belgium, patirengan a romi'ad i 2313 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: pńßi…ĺipp…ô o~uf b~b~v…ô…ĺ*io~u~um i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i pńßi…ĺipp…ô o~uf b~b~v…ô…ĺ*io~u~um, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u b~b~v…ô…ĺ*o~u~uim anini i ¶i pńßi…ĺipp…ô o~uf b~b~v…ô…ĺ*io~u~um, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: Philippe of Belgium I 1960 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 15 a romi'ad masofoc ci Philippe of Belgium, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Belguim anini i ci Philippe of Belgium, patirengan a romi'ad i 2313 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 21 a romi'ad.
